summary: Excellent audience recording capturing the high‑energy Casey Jones opener and the immersive Merriweather shed vibe.
review: The tape delivers a vivid sense of being under the Merriweather shed, with the opening "Casey Jones" highlighted as a thrilling start. Reviewers praise the audio as one of the best audience recordings from the era, making it a must‑listen despite the lack of detailed performance notes.

ai_rating.rationale: Single glowing review (5 stars) emphasizes both superb audience recording quality and an exciting opener, suggesting a high overall rating but limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it one of the best audience tapes, noting clear capture of atmosphere and sound despite being an '80s tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong opening with Casey Jones; overall vibe described as immersive and energetic.
